name: homeassistant-manager
description: Full Home Assistant management — device control, automations, scenes, scripts, history, and notifications

HA_URL.description: URL of your Home Assistant instance (e.g. http://homeassistant.local:8123 or https://ha.yourdomain.com)

HA_TOKEN.description: Long-lived access token — create one in Home Assistant under Profile → Long-Lived Access Tokens
